description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in casual attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a prominent 'I Love 80s' graphic on the front. The individual is wearing straight-cut pants and matching casual shoes, complemented by a large, rugged backpack with visible straps and buckles. The person has medium-length, wavy hair styled with a side part, and their hands are extended outward in a relaxed, neutral pose. The backpack appears to be well-padded and functional, suitable for carrying personal items or daily essentials. The overall appearance suggests a youthful, urban style, ideal for walking in city environments or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a graphic hoodie, straight pants, sneakers, and a large backpack, styled with medium-length wavy hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'I Love 80s' graphic hoodie, relaxed arms, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the backpack, and the side of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backpack with straps and buckles, the back of the hoodie, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the backpack's side, and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt with graphic print, straight-cut pants, and a large functional backpack
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length wavy hair with a side part
